entry.title: Love Our Way
entry.summary:
Author: Dimplesgirl2004

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,875Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Part two of Fate will intervene. Amelia and Minho have finally settled into their relationship after their rocky start. Soon they realize their relationship may not look like a typical relationship, especially when it comes to Chan and Jisung. All four of them must navigate this new dynamic and deal with all the feelings that come to the surface. Some handle that better than others.

entry.title: Overlap
entry.summary:
Author: odysseyofmemory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,251Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 232

Summary: He smiles at her, one thousand Chans reflected one thousand times in the mirrored elevator walls. One thousand parallel universes where she could be in an elevator with Chan in Rome late at night, with his loverboy eyes, and how many of those universes are different? How many of those Chans have loverboy eyes? How many versions of her give in to them? How many good things actually happen to those versions after 2AM? or Everyone knows idols shouldn't date their staff. Chan's not sure if he cares anymore.

entry.title: Eightfold Pleasure
entry.summary:
Author: YouKnowWhatElseIsBig_MyFeet

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,791Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 334

Summary: Jisung is 100% sure he's gay.The only problem? He's a virgin whose entire sexual education has come from watching one faceless camboy with heavenly abs and a voice that makes him feel things he's only ever read about. Then he meets him. The sex is mind-breaking. He's addicted to the dominance, to Minho, to this new person he's becoming. After round two in Minho's bed, fucked-out and blissful, he thinks he's finally got it all figured out. Until he meets Chan the next morning. In Minho's kitchen. A hot stranger who looks at him like he's already been claimed. A hot stranger who touches him, and his dick betrays him instantly. A hot stranger who makes it terrifyingly clear that Minho's bed might not be the only one he'll be warming. Jisung thought his world was complicated before. He had no idea.

entry.title: Little Bunny
entry.summary:
Author: mulchong

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,363Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “Daddy…” Changbin’s voice is a breathy mumble, his gaze still fixed on the colorful cartoon dancing across the screen. “Yeah, baby,” Chan murmurs, reaching out to brush a strand of dark hair from Changbin’s forehead. Changbin blinks slowly, his thumb finding its way into his mouth, sucking absentmindedly. Chan’s hand moves, cupping Changbin’s cheek and tilting his face upward. The little’s eyes are wide and innocent, utterly trusting. Chan’s thumb traces the curve of Changbin’s lower lip, pulling it down just slightly. or: Chan and little Changbin have some much needed playtime.

entry.title: Shameless
entry.summary:
Author: vixx143_angelix

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,008Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Felix, the narcissist, lives the life he's always wanted to live.Men and women at his beck and call with a simple bat of his eyelashes, his boyfriend Chan dedicated and blind to his actions. Chan, the devoted boyfriend. The dream man, the perfect employee, soon-to-be promoted to a senior manager where he works. Life is perfect for him too. Perfectly twisted. Minho, the sadistic rich-boy. He has everything he wants, including a fuck toy he's recently acquired. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: foxinys_dimples

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,531Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 0

Summary: The prince of the kingdom of Zagros, Prince Christopher Bahng Chan, has yet to select a bride to become his queen. It is mandatory for him to be able to become the next king, and he is running out of time before his parents pick his bride for him. So, in a last-ditch effort, Chris decides to look into the most well-known school in all of Zagros: Zagros Institution. He hopes to find a girl there that he is attracted to and would be willing to marry him. When he meets Raven Winston, there is an immediate spark. Enthusiastic that he’d actually found someone who he was interested in, he speedily asks her to be his bride. When Raven says yes, she is immediately whisked into the life of being a royal. As the couple’s wedding draws closer, Chris and Raven quickly form a special bond. A bond that cannot be broken, no matter what life throws at them. Why? Because their adoration for one another is more powerful than anything else in the world.

entry.title: My Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Yoncewcew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,359Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Jisung is broken. He was broken by the hands of people who knew how to use them. He's escaped a toxic home, and a recent awful relationship, but he never truely healed. He spends everyday not knowing when things will get better, diving back into the relapse of self doubt. He's taunted with reminders, of people and events, when he finds someone. His "guardian angel", presented in the figure of a man. He grows everyday opening up. He's safe, he's loved. But it doesn't feel right. - Sorry this is kind of a pissy summary, I promise the actual story is good I just don't want to spoil it too much.WARNING/MINOR SPOILER!! This involves some mature content, read at your own risk, and I'm sorry but Bangchan is kind of the bad guy in this, and I'm not trying to depict him in a bad way at all, so please do not take this the wrong way. Also this is a fictional story, I'm not trying to ship any of the members in a religious way and this is all just my mind and a story I have come up with, not based on any personal or real life events. Also maybe a cheeky little plot tiwst.

entry.title: taste test
entry.summary:
Author: RachyyPooh

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,478Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

Summary: “I read it online somewhere,” Felix just shrugs, “Your piss is like-“ he waves his hands around in the air. “I don’t know, sweeter or something when you're diabetic!” he says. “So you want me to piss in your mouth to test if it’s sweet?” Chan asks. “Exactly, now you get it!” Felix claps his hands together again. “If it is, then fine, we can go to the doctor, Channie. If it’s not, then like I said, nothing to worry about!” he smiles. or Chan is panicking. Felix has an easy solution.

entry.title: Our Stray Cat - Rewrite
entry.summary:
Author: hellokenki

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,355Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: I’ve been staring at the same spot for thirty. Fucking. Minutes.(That pretty much sums up our MC here) This story was written specifically for Black/African American Readers, it is a reader insert but for writing purposes I gave her a name, Hoshi. She is Black and Japanese. To stop your confusion now, she has heterochromia and was bullied for it in her orphanage in America. Please read tags!!! This story has a LOT of dark themes and I write it in first person so it's quite immersive. IF you are uncomfortable with anything listed above please skip this one! I hope you have fun with me on this long ass angsty ride this story has in store. (Also for those who have read the original "Our Stray Cat" I decided to rewrite it because I've changed these past few months as a person and a writer. I wish to show that in this new version!) Thank you for reading :)

entry.title: Final Take
entry.summary:
Author: YouKnowWhatElseIsBig_MyFeet

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,221Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 94

Summary: Deadlines are a bitch. So is Changbin when his creativity is blocked. Chan offers a simple solution: a little tension relief to get the creativity flowing again. Five times they trade favors for creative input, escalating from whispered promises to handjobs and a messy facial. But the sixth time, there's no more trading. There's only the mixing desk, the recording booth window, and Chan finally giving Changbin the rough, dirty fuck he's been begging for all along.

entry.title: Black Rose
entry.summary:
Author: minniepens

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,790Chapters: 27/32Kudos: 1,153

Summary: Kim Seungmin had everything—a perfect life with great grades, a loving family, and friends who admired him. He was popular and successful, with a future that looked bright. But one day, Seungmin made a heroic choice to save a child from a truck and ended up dying. When he woke up, everything had changed. He was in a dark, dangerous place filled with crime and violence, far from the life he knew. Now, Seungmin is stuck in this grim world with seven others, all trapped in a harsh reality. His perfect life is gone, and he's left to navigate this new, frightening existence. Can he find a way out, or will he remain lost in this dark abyss?

entry.title: The Leader's Pretty Stress Reliever
entry.summary:
Author: wttzard

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,505Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: The deadlines were a predatory pack of wolves and he was running out of ground. Chan reached for his phone, the screen’s glare making him wince. He didn’t hesitate. He knew exactly what he needed to stop the spiraling in his brain. He dialed a number he knew by heart."Hyunjin. Get to the studio. Now." Chan said, his voice a low, jagged friction."Chan? It’s late. Is everything okay?" Hyunjin’s voice was soft, slightly breathless even over the phone."I didn't ask what time it was. I told you to get here. Wear that oversized hoodie and nothing else beneath it. Move."
